evidence: Prerequisite checks precede implementation, service creation precedes specs, and focused verification precedes the final regression gate.
Each step is independently executable, and the final step is verification-only.
Edit steps explicitly describe current repo state, missing spec delta, and do-not-touch boundaries.
The last step is a pure runtime gate with an explicit env-stripped command covering both the new service spec and the existing regression suite.
All acceptance criteria and the secret-free/no-live-S3 prerequisite are turned into executable verification steps.
